settings.text:
We want every order to arrive correctly and in good condition. Please contact us as soon as possible if there is an issue with your purchase.

Refund eligibility
Refunds or replacements may be available for damaged, incorrect, or missing items when reported promptly with order details and supporting photos.

Non-refundable items
Opened, used, or tampered products are generally not eligible for refund unless the product is faulty or the issue is caused by our fulfillment process.

How to request help
Contact us with your order number, phone number, issue details, and photos if relevant. Our team will review your request and confirm the next step.
